title: Lightning Payment Instrument
description: Payment instrument shared across the com.musqet.* handler family. Carries a preimage credential proving Lightning Network settlement.

handler_id.description: Business-assigned handler instance id, matching the id field of the entry in payment.handlers[] whose name is one of com.musqet.bolt12, com.musqet.lnurl-pay, or com.musqet.invoice-api.

billing_address.description: Not used for payment verification (Lightning has no AVS). MAY be provided when the Business requires a billing or shipping address for order fulfillment.

display.description: Optional display metadata for Platform UIs.

icon_url.description: URL to an icon representing the Lightning Network payment method.

available_lightning_instrument.description: Declares that this handler accepts Lightning preimage instruments.
